title: macrozanonia clarkei
intro: Macrozanonia clarkei is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae, commonly known as the 'Lime Flower'. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and aiding in digestion, although further studies are necessary to confirm these claims. In traditional medicine, Macrozanonia clarkei is often prepared as a decoction or used in herbal teas, and its oil is extracted for use in aromatherapy.
